goals, there is a constant state of dissatisfaction in life. What the
mind wants and seeks for pleasure turns out to be unfulfilling. This
makes a person feel lost in life and they question their motivation
to achieve their goals. Ketu shows the things we have
accomplished and the talent we have within. When it comes in
contact with the Moon and Venus, creativity is already embedded,
but the desire to love and create is a chore. Whether it is music, art,
design, fashion, or cinema, the task feels easy yet unsatisfying.
In love and relationships, the native can incur heartbreaks and
separation from their spouse or lover; especially in a male's chart.
It shows separation from the mother at an early age due to work or
personal reasons, and shows dissatisfaction of the spouse. There is
a constant battle to attain and release. Whatever these natives gain
in the material world is given away to achieve peace and
spirituality. Ketu's psychic powers are passed onto Venus as a
sense of pleasure and for the mind to obtain a new reality. These
people can have psychic powers, healing abilities, and a way to
connect with the unknown. Eventually, Venus finds her pleasure
through the eccentric yet powerful character of Ketu.

This conjunction represents an active mind that is motivated to do

these people which can be a negative thing. If someone believes
that racism and slavery in United States is necessary to preserve
the nation, they would be willing to die for such a belief no matter
what education and advice they have received.
However, if the mind is on track, it can produce a strong willed
person who fights for the underprivileged and is willing to die for

have a strong belief system and would be a guiding factor for the
person. Mars and Jupiter usually produce someone who motivates
others with their will power and wisdom.
Moon + Mars + Saturn conjunction:
Moon: mother, emotions, sensuality, mind, feelings, thoughts,
imagination, fertility, and fame
Mars: efforts, energy, will power, stamina, strength, passion,
fighting ability, impulsivity, accidents, injuries, wounds, sports,

This combination produces a very turbulent force on the mind.
Both Mars and Saturn represent a war zone, and when the Moon is
in the middle it causes a battle of right and wrong. This force may
be so strong that it can produce a native with bipolar disorder or
177

any other kind of mental disorder. One of the most profound
effects of this conjunction is severe anger problems. The outburst
is so intense, it can come down to killing a person if that's what
satisfies the mind and makes it feel balanced. No matter what
house this conjunction takes place in, the mind will experience
post-traumatic stress disorder in that house. This is especially true
if the Moon has middle degrees. Both Mars and Saturn are
throwing arrows at each other and most of them are landing on the
Moon.
I have seen such conjunctions quite a few times and none have
prevailed. They were all dealing with the battlefield in their mind
and surroundings. This is one of the most intense conjunctions to
have in one's life. A great escape for such conjunction would be if
the Moon has the highest degree and is away more than 15 degrees
from Mars and Saturn. Professionally speaking, this conjunction
can make for an engineer, miner, policeman, soldier, politician,
and professional fighter. They have quite an interest in the art of
weaponry like sword making, fencing, and guns.
If the Moon happens to be in an earth sign, especially its exalted
sign of Taurus, the native would be able to overcome the battle
within and steer towards mental progress. However, there will still
be broken glass on their path to redemption.
Moon + Mars + Rahu conjunction:

Mars: efforts, energy, will power, stamina, strength, passion,

Rahu: illusion, taboo breaker, unconventional, deceiver, magician,

This conjunction goes from one extreme to the other. The mind is

excessive anger, illusion, psychosis, and a business like mentality.
The mother can easily be the punisher in early life. Instead of
spanking, the mother would beat the native. In India, where
physical abuse in the household is normal, the native could
experience violence from the mother and male sibling. This can
happen if the Moon is having the lowest degrees in the chart. If
Moon possesses the highest degree, the mind would still be full of
tension and anger, but it would be able to overcome it, unless of
course the Moon is debilitated.
When these natives apply their mind to something, they will try to
achieve at any cost, even if it requires hurting someone else. There
is a great deal of mental tension that stems from running into
people of a shady nature. If such a conjunction occurs in the 7th,
8th or 12th House, it can show a person who might see things of
other worlds, whether it's spirits, angels, or energies of other
dimensions. These may be mirages of the mind, as Rahu is an
illusionist. Such conjunctions occurring in the 2nd and 4th House
can show a thief, or someone who steals from their mother and
other family members. To make such claims, the native’s
nakshatra has to be studied as well.
Mars represents drive, and Rahu represents breaking boundaries
and taboo. The mind may be inclined towards illegal deeds or
activities that are not accepted by society like joining gangs,
pornography, or becoming an illegal arms dealer.

Moon + Mars + Ketu conjunction:
Moon: mother, emotions, sensuality, mind, feelings, thoughts,
imagination, fertility and fame
Mars: efforts, energy, will power, stamina, strength, passion,
fighting ability, impulsivity, accidents, injuries, wounds, sports,
athlete, martial arts, weaponry, engineer
Ketu: isolation, separation, ashram, spirituality, enlightenment,
detachment from material world, psychic intuition, occult and
mystical knowledge, universal
Ketu is an impulsive fighter, and in the reflection of Mars, it
represents what we have already accomplished. Ketu is the
victorious army while Mars is the charging army. This is another
symbol of war, and can create an out of ordinary blood bath. The
mind rejects the idea of war, but is ready to charge against others
at any moment who pose a threat. Anytime the Moon comes in
contact with two malefic planets, it's known as hemming. Here, the
Moon is hemmed between two planets. Peace of mind no longer
exists. The mind is agitated, nervous, and anxious about being
attacked. They feel like a warrior sleeping on a battlefield. There is
no time to rest as the enemy is charging, and can attack any
second. Ketu is the intuitive power, while Mars is the energy itself.
The mind can be highly charged with intuition if such conjunctions
occur in 12th House. This conjunction works best in earth signs
where both Mars and Ketu's energy is stable. They also do well
with Pisces, which is about transformation.
After battling opposition from the mother, friends and other male
colleagues, the native seeks the path of enlightenment, and it is
easily received due to Mars' highly charged attitude towards
attainment of goals. The mother might have died at a very young
age. The native may have been separated from the mother for a
long duration, either because the mother was abusive or had severe
180

health problems. If the mother is healthy up until age 15, then there
is no need to worry. She gains energy and intuitive powers through
the native's Mars. If Mars has the lowest degree and Ketu the
highest, this can lead to so much turbulence in the mind that the
native may commit suicide or even a murder suicide.
Moon + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
Moon: mother, emotions, sensuality, mind, feelings, thoughts,
imagination, fertility and fame
Jupiter: knowledge, wisdom, wealth, optimism, hope, law,

Saturn: responsibility, organization, structure, delay, separation,
grief, life span as in longevity, antique items, old people, chronic
illnesses, fear, anxiety, labor work, lower class, lower type jobs,
construction
The mind is able to organize information, and is disciplined
enough to attain higher knowledge and wisdom. In this
conjunction, the mind is not severely attacked by Saturn's cold,
harsh behavior because expansive Jupiter is playing the role of
referee. Jupiter's optimism and light heartedness keeps the mind in
balance. It also keeps the mind organized, disciplined, and focused
on the tasks at hand. Since Jupiter represents knowledge, the native
is drawn towards learning throughout life. They may choose to
pursue law, biomedical engineering, writing, preaching, teaching
and governing.
Jupiter and Saturn's conjunction bring a sense of maturity to a
person. Since the mind is involved, they become studious, and
want to follow a well directed path and live a simple, happy life.
They are your government workers, school teachers,
administrators, and city employees. They like steadiness at their
181

workplace. This has something to do with routine and utilizing
their knowledge base. Teachers are often seen with such a
combination. The professor keeps learning while teaching the
same subjects repeatedly. Their mind is concentrating on the work
at hand, and there is little time to be depressed or to play. They are
not bothered by this, as it is part of being human.
President Barack Obama has a Jupiter and Saturn conjunction in
the ascendant while Jupiter aspects the Moon. He was a professor
at the University of Chicago teaching constitutional law. He
enjoyed educating his students on a subject matter he was
passionate about while reinforcing his belief in America and the
laws it was founded upon. This is not an exact example of this
conjunction, but demonstrates the impact that may be felt by the
native.

This native engages in learning to a point of obsession; however

182

affairs. Such a conjunction can produce a scientist working on
stem cell research, artificial intelligence, and fertility issues. It can

The mind is filled with optimism and hope, however Rahu brings

example, a person can gain knowledge about their workplace and
since the mind is eclipsed, they will not be able to distinguish
between right and wrong. Therefore, they may steal without

The mother of the native will also have knowledge and interest in

native's relationship with mother. Also, the mother's purpose in life
may be to selfishly gain from the native while providing
superficial affection. If Rahu has the lowest degrees, then it will
have more impact on a person's interests rather than scheming and
breaking the law.

Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
Mars: efforts, energy, will power, stamina, strength, passion,

Jupiter: knowledge, wisdom, wealth, optimism, hope, law,

This is a very action oriented conjunction that can show a
professional athlete, construction worker, engineer, or boxer. We
have already established the fact that Mars and Saturn create a war
zone when they sit together, but having the guidance of Jupiter in
the middle of a war can really set the bar of winning. It is similar
to having Krishna drive the chariot for you like he did for Arjun in
the Mahabharata. The native would have the ability to fight and
always be active. Unorganized and impulsive action leading to
possibly making poor decisions will now have guidance. The
person might still have conflicts and the tendency to go to war, but
there would be an element of organization and planning as to how
the war would be fought.
Jupiter can still be harmed even though it is the largest planet in
the solar system guiding Saturn and Mars. This is called the
“hemming of a planet.” When a benefic planet like Jupiter is
sitting with two malefic planets, or two malefic planets are on
206

either side, then the planet is being hemmed, as in being pressured
by both sides. If Jupiter has the highest degree and is sitting in a
fire sign or earth sign, then Jupiter would be greatly affected along
with the things he signifies like children, marriage, wealth and
prosperity. The person would always fight to make ends meet.
They would have to struggle to gain happiness and a good family
life. However, if Jupiter is exalted, or in its own sign of Sagittarius,
then the war is being fought on Jupiter's home court. Jupiter will
have far greater strength to control and protect himself. If Jupiter
has the highest degree, he would withstand the blows being thrown
by Mars and Saturn's war. If Jupiter contains the lowest degree,
then the native would apply the art of war to their benefit and will
go into battle prepared, whether stepping into a boxing ring,
corporate environment, or being a mechanical engineer. Jupiter
having the lowest degree in a strong sign could show someone
who is a technical professor or teacher in the areas of physics and
engineering.

military who has tremendous knowledge of warfare

Example 1: 3 Planetary Conjunction
In Example 1, we have a Cancer Ascendant chart with Venus,
Saturn, and the Moon in conjunction. How do we interpret this?
First, we see the Ascendant Lord Moon is in the 11th House in the
sign of Taurus. The number 2 represents the second sign of the
zodiac belt, which is Taurus. So, the Moon is exalted in Taurus.
Next, we see that the Lord of the 11th House is sitting in the 11th
House, which is Venus, while the Lord of the 7th and 8th House
Saturn is also sitting with two planets.
We have to see who is winning the planetary war, and we can't
really do that that since we do not know their degree. However,
just by looking at sign placement, we can clearly see that the Moon
is winning the war by being exalted. Usually, the Moon would be
filled with stress, worry, fear, and depression when it sits with
212

Saturn, but here the Moon would only receive the other side of
Saturn's qualities, which are focus, discipline, and structure. The
mind is very much balanced, and is able make grounded, realistic
decisions for one's financial welfare because Taurus represents
what we value, while the 11th House represents acquisitions of all
kinds. The native would gain through the mother and marriage
since Venus is the karaka of marriage.
How is Venus impacting others and how is Venus being impacted?
Well, without knowing the degree we have to go by the placement.
Here, Venus would infuse its sensuality and creativity into a
person. The native's mind would be in pursuit of pleasure and
luxury, and will make their money through women. While Venus
is sitting with Saturn, it is becoming a bit cold towards romance
and love. Its true nature is now being molded by only looking for
relationships that bring security and stability rather than true love.
This chart shows a huge network of friends who would help the
native achieve financial success throughout life. This conjunction
is creating a powerful dhana yoga, due to the Ascendant and 11th
Lord being in conjunction in the 11th House. Saturn, the original
lord of the 11th house is helping his best friend Venus.
Since all three planets are aspecting the 5th House, the native will
gain through speculative business, creative pursuits, and gambling.
We can see that the Venus and Saturn conjunction can create a late
marriage for the native; especially since Saturn rules the 7th House
of marriage for a Cancer Ascendant and usually delays marriage
until one’s mid-thirties.
213

Example 2: 3 Planetary Conjunction
We see the degrees of the planets, and the Moon is not only
winning the planetary war, but is also winning the war of degree.
In this chart, emotions, imagination, and intuition will play a
bigger role. The native's discipline, focus, and structure in life will
be based more on positive emotions rather than being a
workaholic. The creativity of the person will also be influenced by
intuition more than ideas and structure. Saturn is still present, and
will still put discipline and structure in emotions, but will not be
impacted by the negative side as much.
214

Since Venus has the middle degree, it's impacting Saturn as well.
This means the native would do the minimum amount of work to
bring pleasure, security, and luxury in their life. They will work
hard, since Saturn aspects the ascendant from the 11th House, but
they are set is to work hard in the beginning and enjoy the fruits of
labor later in life.
Example 3: 3 Planetary Conjunction
In Example 3, we have Saturn with the lowest degree. That means
Saturn is having a great impact on the conjunction. There is less
imagination and emotion, yet more creativity, stability of income,
and discipline to use the mind and artistic talent to make money.
They are more focused on how to implement ideas rather than
generating ideas. These people can take others’ concepts and bring
great structure and organization into them. The true imagination of
the mind may not be present. They can also take others’ ideas and
enhance them creatively because Venus is being infused with
Saturn's qualities. A Saturn and Venus conjunction makes a person
creative.
215

Example 4: 3 Planetary Conjunction
In Example 4, we have Cancer Ascendant with Mars, Venus, and
Saturn in the 10th House in the sign of Aries. We can also see the
degrees of the planets. Mars wins the war by sign, and Saturn wins
the war of influence by having the lowest degrees. We must
remember this is a "WAR ZONE", and you have a gentle benefic
planet, Venus, in the middle of war with its middle degrees. This
shows a late marriage due to Saturn and Venus conjunction, and
due to Saturn's 10th aspect on the 7th House. Since Venus is
hemmed between two great malefics, she is being hurt badly. The
native can experience a violent marriage with someone who is
216

older, clever, and needs to win the battle with their other half. The
native can abuse or hurt a woman, especially at the workplace.
Sexual abuse is big with this conjunction especially in a woman’s
chart. The marriage is very chaotic and usually ends up in a
divorce. If there is a 10 degree difference or more between all
three planets, the effect is lessened. Then, the person will become
very lustful and sexual, but finds it hard to relate to the opposite
sex. This conjunction occurring in the 10th House shows someone
who is an engineer, government worker, policeman, army general,
or designer if they are going through Venus' mahadasha.
Regardless of gender, they will also run into authoritative women
in their life whom they will clash with, especially in the
workplace. They also make very good builders and real estate
agents with such a conjunction due to all three planets aspecting
the 4th House.
Example 5: 3 Planetary Conjunction
In Example 5, we have a Mars, Jupiter, and Rahu conjunction in
the 9th House while in the sign of Pisces. The 9th House
217

represents higher learning, philosophy, religious studies, spiritual
journeys, graduate degrees, teachings of the father, and your
educators. Since we are using Cancer Ascendant as an example,
this also shows dharma karma adipati yoga, meaning a spiritual
path and guidance; a life devoted to the higher self. Rahu brings a
sense of foreign education, teachings, and preaching. The person
will teach about foreign subjects. Mars and Rahu are putting
energy into Jupiter, and the approach to education and learning is
amplified by Jupiter. Pisces is the sign of imagination, and it is
utilized to teach and preach about foreign cultures and exotic
lands. The person can also be a professor of chemistry.
This conjunction is also creating raja yoga. Lord of Kendra and
Lord of Trikona are sitting in trikona. Rahu is also becoming raja
yoga karaka, so this person will reach higher ranks of society and
perhaps become the head preacher. Whether they take a short cut
or cheat to achieve this goal has to be seen in degrees.
4 Planetary Conjunctions:
This is where things get a big confusing for the native, especially
in terms of personality and general significance. Several energies
are mixing with each other creating a unique blend. One must still
judge who is winning the planetary war by sign placement and
degree placement. A planet in his or her own sign that is being
exalted will be more powerful, while the planet with the lowest
degrees, (other than Rahu and Ketu) will have the most positive
influence on the winner of the war.
In our Sun conjunctions, we will assume that the Sun has the
lowest degree, and impacts the rest of the conjunctions in a
positive way; none are combust.
218

Sun + Moon + Mercury + Venus conjunction:
The mind is communicative, artistic, intuitive, creative, and
analytical. The native has a charming personality, and knows how
to talk their way through anything and get what they want. They
are bright, and love to communicate about art, culture, creativity,
and knowledge. The person's mind is filled with thoughts and ideas
to better the world and make it a more peaceful place. The speech
of the native is very pleasant, soft, and dynamic. Both the mother
and father of the native are quite communicative, and may be
creative themselves. The mother is a reflection of the father. She
takes up the father’s work, values, and personality, and passes it on
to her children. This is because the Moon is only the reflection of
the Sun. There is a great need for music, art, and creativity in the
person's life.
Sun + Moon + Mercury + Mars conjunction:
The native will have a tremendous drive for communication. Their
speech may be viewed as harsh, direct and rude, yet these people
tend to make some of the best leaders. They do not see things
through art or pleasure, but through the eyes of practicality. They
know what has to be done in order to get the job completed; just as
a soldier knows what needs to be done in order to win the war. It's
quite hard to argue with these people, as their mind does not
process third party suggestions or information. The ego is
energized, and their form of education is more physical, technical,
and at an engineering level. Both the mother and father of the
native are quite aggressive in raising them, whether through
rigorous physical activity such as sports, or putting pressure on the
native regarding their analytical and mathematical skills. Both
parents will be aggressive communicators and will be more
managers than parents, especially if Mars has the highest degree
and the Sun the lowest. The mind is constantly bombarded with
ideas, and sometimes they are violent.
219

Sun + Moon + Mercury + Jupiter conjunction:
Parents become a source of knowledge and intelligence. They can
be teachers, preachers, or accountants. The mind is curious about
the world, and is able to focus on each subject with great
optimism. There is a thirst for knowledge, and for the mind and
soul to elevate to a higher consciousness. The speech of the native
is very soft, and that of a preacher. When they communicate, there
is a sense of preaching grounded in spirituality, religion, or
philosophy. There is a great interest in writing religious symbolic
text; the native may even write fiction related to the higher self.
They can make great university professors, high school counselors,
financial gurus, and accountants.
Sun + Moon + Mercury + Saturn conjunction:
There is a sense of duty when it comes to communication and
speech. The mind is intelligent, disciplined, structured, and
organized. There can be a psychological burden upon the native
regarding their parents and siblings. The parents of the native are
quite disciplined and organized, and expect the same from their
children. When they speak, there is a great sense of responsibility.
They only speak when they have important things to share. The
mother will be communicative with the child but will be
disciplined and conservative in her tone. This makes the native
very organized in his or her life. The father can be a government
worker, insurance salesman, or administrator. If such a conjunction
occurs in the 3rd or 10th House, the native could choose the career
path of an executive assistant.
Sun + Moon + Mercury + Rahu conjunction:
220

The intelligence, intuition, and emotions of this native are vastly
superior to others. With these strengths, they can also be very
egoistic as Rahu is more powerful than the Sun, and is amplifying
the qualities of other planets including the Sun. This is especially
true if the Sun is exalted, or in his sign of Leo. However, if the Sun
is debilitated, it will give the native low self-esteem, low
confidence, and an ego based on illusion. The mother may not
nourish the native, for she does not enjoy motherhood, but is just
trying to raise her children for the sake of it. Both the mind and
intelligence are being eclipsed by Rahu, which can make a brilliant
psychopath or someone mentally disturbed if such a conjunction
occurs in the sign of Scorpio, Virgo, or Pisces. The person can feel
like they are hallucinating. The native can also become overly
sensitive, sympathetic, and emotional due to Rahu's amplification
of the Moon's energy.
Sun + Moon + Mercury + Ketu conjunction:
There is a great disconnect with the native’s parents. They either
left at an early age, or the relationship between the parents and the
native was very distant and cold, and lacked understanding. If Ketu
has the highest degree, this scenario is likely. The personality of
the native can be greatly affected with the loss of identity and ego.
The mind is too impulsive, and the intelligence of the native
suffers if such a conjunction occurs in the 8th or 12th House. In the
6th House, Mercury and the Sun do quite well. This creates a great
mathematician, doctor, healer, occultist, shaman, or spiritual guide.
Overall, this makes for a very awkward personality who thinks and
behaves differently from the rest of the crowd. Having such a
conjunction in a water sign or water sign ruling nakshatra can
create a mentally disturbed person. They have the burden of
thinking through emotions with such energy like Ketu and
Mercury causing chaos and lack of logic. Such a conjunction in an
earth sign or fire sign can prove very beneficial. If Ketu has the
221

highest degree, it will still create separation from things related to
each planet, which can also lead to an incomplete education.
Sun + Moon + Venus + Mars conjunction:
The personality of the native is creative, sexual, and passionate.
They take up all types of work with passion, and only take on
projects that are of interest to them. They enjoy creating something
new and unique. Although this can produce arguments with the
native’s spouse due to two hot planets hemming Venus, it still
brings about lot of passion in relationships. If Venus is too close to
the Sun, then it can bring about a spouse who might be low on
confidence and self-image, which can frustrate the native.
Personally, they are charming and seductive. Work wise, they
should only take up a career that invokes passion in their life. They
are impulsive, and depending upon the sign, they may not
complete tasks if Mars is weak. If Mars has the lowest degree, then
it can spell anger towards women and their spouse.
Sun + Moon + Venus + Jupiter conjunction:
This is a great conjunction that shows lot of respect towards one’s
parents and teachers. They have very good marriages in life unless
Venus or Jupiter are combust, which can bring trouble. The
personality is very pleasant and spiritual. They love guiding people
towards beauty, forming good relationships, and attaining peace of
mind. These natives can make great psychologists, spiritual guides,
preachers, and professors. They also have the right knowledge to
attain positions in government. Venus shows creativity, art, and
acting. Its qualities are expanded and brightened. Such a
conjunction in the 3rd and 5th House from the ascendant and the
Moon can show a lot of acting skills and natural artistic talent.
222

Sun + Moon + Venus + Rahu conjunction:
This conjunction shows a great deal of burden upon the mother
and wife of the male native. If such a conjunction is being formed
tightly, then the mind will be full of pressure and anxiety. The wife
in a man's chart can take the role of the parents while also being
from foreign lands. The mind is always involved in creativity, art,
and foreign things. The native may have unusual tendencies
towards the opposite sex and art, meaning they could have some
sort of a fetish. Rahu can cause a lot of damage upon the mind and
ego. If Rahu has the highest degrees, then it's engulfing the two
most important planets: the Sun and Moon. Such eclipsed planets
will only find the light after the age of 36. Through that time, the
native might have difficulty dealing with their own mind and
personality. Women might come and go, and relationships could
break up due to the native's own personality. A woman with such a
conjunction could find herself falling in love with men from
foreign lands; whether it’s a foreign state or foreign country. She
would be very interested in fashion and luxury items.
Sun + Moon + Venus + Ketu conjunction:
The personality and mind of the native is quite disturbed and
dissatisfied in life. There is a lot of disappointment stemming from
the parents. The native's parents might have left early on in life, or
the relationship is quite distant if Ketu has the highest degree.
There is also a great dissatisfaction from women and relationships
in general, as they try to find something which might not exist.
This nature can lead to addictive behavior in sex and relationships.
They could be addicted to the idea of relationships, but always
move on from person to person. Such a conjunction produces a
great artistic or musical talent in the 2nd, 3rd, 5th and 10th House.
The mind is also very much inclined towards a teacher who is
spiritual and practices spirituality. Such a conjunction in the
ascendant can show moksha and a spiritual sage.
223

Sun + Moon + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:
The personality of the native is quite aggressive, bossy, and wants
control. They are authoritative figures that have a very impulsive
mind and can burst into anger at any second. The good thing about
this conjunction is that they are able to withstand most storms in
life and face them without fear. They are very knowledgeable
about who they are. The native may suffer a lot of physical
discipline through their father. This is especially true if Mars has
the lowest degree and the Sun is close to Mars. The mother of the
native would also be a guide, and may become the father figure of
the family. This is one conjunction that is very hot and needs a lot
of meditation to reduce anger.
Sun + Moon + Mars + Rahu conjunction:
This native might be very aggressive, arrogant, and egoistic to a
point that they may not have friends. Their personality might
suffer due to lack of self-esteem if Rahu has the highest degree and
eclipses the Sun and Moon. The mind is constantly battling
unnecessary fear and anger, which is difficult to change. The
mother of the native may have been under a lot pressure. She
might have been physically abused by the father or a fatherly
figure. Emotions also run very high and are spur of the moment.
Rahu eclipses and amplifies qualities at the same time. It may
lower the confidence of a person. However, the native would
artificially amplify their ego in front of others to hide their
insecurity. There may even be arguments over land with the
native’s parents. Such people may look confident, honest, and
trustworthy from the outside, but they may not be genuine.
Sun + Moon + Mars + Ketu conjunction:
224

This is quite a disturbing conjunction in terms of mental issues;
especially if Ketu possesses the highest degree. They have
thoughts of bloodshed, sharp objects, wars, and fighting. They may
think of doing certain unethical things to others and find it
enjoyable. Such people enjoy the sight of blood and dead bodies,
which can ultimately signify a doctor or surgeon if in the 8th
House. It can also show someone with the capacity to become a
serial killer. However, we must look at the Moon's placement by
nakshatra. In the nakshatra of Mercury, Rahu and Ketu can
produce quite a heavy mind that fantasizes about things out of this
world. Their personality is also very dry and complex. They
usually seek isolation and prefer being in their own world rather
than communicating with people. They may have several bad
relationships with their father or fatherly figures if Ketu has the
highest degree and Mars has the lowest degree. Both parents can
be physically abusive towards the native.
Sun + Moon + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
This is a mature minded personality. They are very hard working,
disciplined, organized, and full of wisdom. They love following
the law and feel a sense of duty to do the right thing. Even though
Saturn is present here, it may not cause much damage to the Moon.
Saturn’s goal is to make the Moon see the real world. Such people
are very practical inside and out. They think of everything in a
realistic manner. The father or mother of the native could be a
lawyer, government worker, or biology teacher. These people can
make great priests, psychologists, and even chefs.
Sun + Moon + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:
This conjunction produces a mixed result. The mind is optimistic
and filled with extremely scientific thoughts. They will question
their father and teachers, and will have a fragile relationship with
their superiors. The father of the native may travel a lot to foreign
225

countries, and might be away from the native's life. The
educational pursuits of the person will be very unusual and
foreign. They will take up subjects that might be taboo. Such
people will also seek knowledge of the unknown like astrology,
tarot, and the occult; especially if this conjunction happens in
Ketu's nakshatra. If Rahu has the highest degree, then it can
produce low self-esteem in the native until mid-life, and traditional
educational support may not be there.
Sun + Moon + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:
This conjunction can make a person very spiritual since Jupiter and
Ketu are present together with the two most important planets. If
such a conjunction occurs in the 8th or 12th House, then
spirituality is confirmed. However, if Ketu holds the highest
degree in the conjunction, then it will eclipse the Sun and Moon,
and the native would feel deprived of their personality and soul.
They will suffer from low self esteem. If Ketu has the lowest
degree, it would make the native spiritual. There is hope and
optimism within the native. They can be separated from their
mother at an early age if Ketu has a higher degree than the Moon
without help from Jupiter; especially if it’s a waning moon.
Sun + Moon + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:
This conjunction brings a lot of fear, anxiety, and unusual dreams
to a person. The mind is also quite depressed from time to time
because of restrictions and delays toward goals. The mind wants to
achieve them right away, but they keep running into obstacles.
Although they are hard workers with tremendous discipline,
organization skills, and structure in their professional life, they
suffer from low self-esteem in their personal life. These people do
not blossom until after the age of 35. The native’s parents could be
separated at birth or involved in frequent foreign travel for work.
This personality feels drained mentally. They feel like they have
226

aged quickly due to the burden of responsibility. This is true if
Saturn has the lowest degree and Rahu has the highest, where Sun
and Moon (Mind and Soul) feel tremendous pressure from both
sides. Such people can also be very strict and egoistic bosses
because most of the time their mind is thinking about work and
achieving worldly goals. Even at home, they often talk about work
or future plans for work.
Sun + Moon + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:
This conjunction produces a person with a mixed or confusing
personality. They have a strong work ethic and are disciplined at
times, but then they feel lazy and do not feel like doing anything.
This can also show separation from parents at an early age. They
are very dedicated to their parents if Ketu has the lowest degree. It
becomes a spiritual duty to be with their mother and father.
Sun + Mercury + Venus + Mars conjunction:
There is great passion, persistence, and pleasure in the way the
native speaks and behaves. The mind calculates quickly and
aggressively for the purpose of sex, sensuality, love, and
relationships. They quickly jump to conclusions and impulsively
enter relationships. They are talkative, and have the ability and
desire to make an impact in conversations with others. These are
the bubbly personalities who are creative, artistic, social, and bold.
They are quite capable on an intimate level. Venus softens harsh
speech, especially if Venus is influencing Mars by degree or sign
placement, like Libra, Taurus, or Pisces. If such a conjunction
occurs in the sign of Cancer or Virgo, then the woman can suffer
physical and verbal abuse from their husband or boyfriend. A man
with such a conjunction can get involved in physical violence
towards women, or will attract women who love to create drama in
life.
227

Sun + Mercury + Venus + Jupiter conjunction:
This conjunction calls for a person who might love public
speaking, preaching, and does not mind being in front of an
audience to share their knowledge. The personality of the native is
very positive and communicative, and there is a sense of creativity
within. The Sun is brightening up the quality of all planets while
Jupiter is expanding the quality of Mercury and Venus. Both of
these planets represent creativity, skills of mimicking, writing, and
the media. The native will find love and pleasure through studies,
writing, higher knowledge and spirituality. In a man's chart, the
wife can be an accountant or in the financial world. She is well
educated and behaved. A woman would also attract a similar
husband in a similar profession, especially if the conjunction
occurs in 10th, 1st, 2nd, and 6th House. The native is extremely
witty, clever, and is able to comprehend advanced textbooks.
There is more emphasis on knowledge than on creativity; however,
seeking knowledge becomes a creative process.
Sun + Mercury + Venus + Saturn conjunction:
This conjunction is a bit turbulent; it is imaginative and creative,
logical and organized, yet cold towards romance. These are some
of the traits of one of the most amazing men that ever lived: Albert
Einstein. I have already mentioned he was musician, charming,
and sexual, yet when it came to his work he was focused to a point
where he ignored his wife and children, which eventually led to
two divorces. Saturn and the Sun both make Venus creative and
artistic, while Mercury becomes quite communicative, focused,
disciplined, and structured in studies and writing. One will have to
see which planet is having the most impact if it is not combust.
The marriage for men can be delayed. If one forces themselves to
marry early, then Saturn will break it unless it happens after the
age of 28. If this conjunction occurs in the 10th, 1st, or 7th House,
then marrying in one’s thirties will be a very sound choice. A
228

woman will also have her marriage delayed because Venus
represents relationships for both sexes.
Sun + Mercury + Venus + Rahu conjunction:
The native feels a great deal of stress from both sides. The hot Sun
and cold Rahu are crunching two benefic planets. There is going to
be a sweet and sour taste. There is a need and want for a
relationship with a lot of communication. Such people would text
or talk on the phone all day long with their significant other if they
had a chance. Regardless of gender, they want a constant report on
what their love interest is doing. These four planets represent a
glamorous lifestyle, and since Rahu is illusion, the person might
pretend to live in a world they designed, however it is not reality.
They may tell stories about their life that may not be true. They
may max out their credit to feel wealthy; something that should be
avoided at all costs.
Sun + Mercury + Venus + Ketu conjunction:
If Ketu has the highest degree, there is separation from comfort,
communication, detachment of self identity, and perhaps even a
speech disorder. Marriage might happen in a timely fashion, but it
might be with someone unexpected. There may be a great
disconnect between you and your spouse. Instead of enhancing the
creative quality of Venus, Ketu makes Venus believe it already has
the best quality to be creative. Ketu is the grounded army that has
won, unlike Mars, which is the charging army. The Sun is in front
of an eclipse, creating a battle of finding one's ego and identity.
The native might also be eccentric in their behavior with friends,
relationships, and family. Planets that are closest to each other by
degree will have a greater impact on each other than with others. If
Mercury and Venus are 3 degrees apart while the Sun and Ketu are
229

more than 10 degrees apart, then Venus and Mercury are receiving
a lighter aspect from both planets.
Sun + Mercury + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:
There is a great need to communicate a message of higher
knowledge, higher power, and higher authority. Their speech is
very aggressive and assertive regarding the things they believe in.
The mind races to deliver messages of authority. This can show
someone who is a government press secretary, pastor with extreme
beliefs, or a stern manager. This native loves communicating, but
they always want to win the conversation. They want to deal with
people in authority or high status. Their speech has great optimism
and hope, yet is aggressive and goal oriented. This can also show a
martial artist who only fights when provoked. Jupiter's guidance
brings about a great sense of right and wrong within the native.
They can make for verbally abusive bosses. The father of the
native could also be verbally abusive.
Sun + Mercury + Mars + Saturn conjunction:
Although the speech of the native is quite aggressive, there is a
great deal of formation and structure to it. They don't just say
whatever comes to mind at the moment. Their speech has a sense
of discipline and organization. If Mars has the lowest degree, then
speech will be constructed with organization, but it will still be
aggressive. The native will take action after great assessment and
analysis. Such a person can make an excellent engineer. They can
excel in the field of surgery and even acupuncture. Mars' nature to
dig deep combined with intelligence and organization makes for
strong technical skills.
Sun + Mercury + Mars + Rahu conjunction:
This conjunction can commonly be seen in computer engineers,
programmers, and hackers. Quick intellect combined with the
amplification of Rahu produces some of the greatest geniuses in
230

math and science. Such a native would demand respect for their
work because the ego is also being amplified by Rahu. They can
be arrogant about their intelligence and language skills. There is
also a great interest to master many languages, and such a
conjunction helps the individual to achieve just that. On the
downside, if Rahu has the highest degree or closest conjunction to
Mercury, then it can produce a verbally abusive person who is a
pathological liar. This can also lead to scamming people in the
mahadasha of Rahu and Mercury.
Sun + Mercury + Mars + Ketu conjunction:
This is not a very good conjunction for improving society,
however it works well for the native. These people can be very
aggressive without thinking. They can hit without realizing what
their actions will do. Mercury is not only hemmed by a malefic,
but the intelligence is getting a very impulsive since Mars and
Ketu are alike and don't think before acting. They can be such
geniuses that it can produce a psychopath. These native should
also take care of their health, especially their muscles, heart, and
nervous system. Being in the presence of such a person can be
quite daunting because they will always pressure and push you to
do things their way. If you don't follow them, they challenge you
on your decision and fight you. If Mercury is too close to the Sun,
then it can greatly damage their intelligence and common sense.
Sun + Venus + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:
The native is not only passionate in romantic relationships with the
opposite sex, but the attraction stems from the intellect of the other
person. Mars' lustful energy is being expanded by Jupiter's
knowledge base. Lust and sexual drive have a need for intellectual
stimulation. The personality of the native is positive, energetic, and
wise. A man with such a conjunction can meet a very confident
and proud woman who may be in a financial field, government, or
231

a hotel manager. These women not only provide stability to a man,
but also fulfill his needs. With such a conjunction occurring in
Jupiter's sign, the person will have more love for spiritual visions,
imagination, and philosophy than pursuing relationships. In the
zodiac sign of the Sun and Mars, such a person would be more
passionate, aggressive, and lustful about mundane things rather
than religious or spiritual studies.
Sun + Venus + Mars + Saturn conjunction:
This is a very difficult placement for Venus. It is surrounded by
friends and enemies who are naturally malefic planets. The person
is quite creative, sexual, and masculine, yet there is a sense of
burden when it comes to women. This can be for both sexes, but
men experience greater frustration in love. He may find a wife who
is sexual, yet distant and cold. She may be sensual, yet status
oriented, goal oriented, overly organized, and technical. She may
be very critical of her man in an overt way. This conjunction is
about “telling it like it is” if it occurs in the Sun or Mars' signs.
The wife may be older and more masculine than the native. The
marriage could also turn violent for both sexes due to Venus being
stuck in a great planetary war between Saturn, Mars, and the Sun.
One must also look at the houses that are being controlled by all 4
planets. Such qualities will refine this conjunction, but here Venus
is being hanged. The Sun's presence will make the native fairly
mature with leadership skills.
Sun + Venus + Mars + Rahu conjunction:
This is not the best conjunction for forming good, reasonable,
relationships of any kind; especially those related to marriage and
romance. Sensitive Venus is hemmed by 3 malefic planets that are
either trying exploit, use, or burn her. In a man's chart, it can lead
to finding a woman who is quite turbulent. She may have been
molested, beaten, harassed, uses drugs, drinks excessively, or is
depressed. She could also be cunning like Rahu. Whatever the
232

case, there will always be some stinger with the female in his life.
The man could be quite sexual and loves being with as many
women as possible. Eventually, it will only lead to being drained
out of Venus’ energy. After midlife, pursuing relationships will no
longer have the same appeal because they could be searching for a
partner that doesn't exist. There may be a major mental conflict
with women in his life. In Mars' sign, it can have the worst effect.
If such a conjunction occurs in Venus' sign of Taurus or Libra,
then Venus would be able to calm all the negative energy down. If
Venus is exalted, it can actually lead to greater dissatisfaction.
Sun + Venus + Mars + Ketu conjunction:
There is a great disconnect with one's own sexuality, love, and
relationships. Ketu has the tendency of dimming things down
when it comes in conjunction. There is dissatisfaction with
romance and intimacy, which eventually leads to the single life.
This is especially true if Ketu has the highest degree. Initially, the
person would be very much interested in sexual intimacy.
However, after going through several relationships, they will start
doubting the meaning of love and romance. They start exploring
beyond their own life to express sexuality. They can become a
dancer, stripper, writer or a sexologist. Ketu's quality of research
makes the native want to explore meaningless sexual behavior.
This can be balanced in Venus' own signs, where Venus’ quality
will be stored and will prevail behind the veil of Ketu. These
natives might express sexuality to the public but within they might
have no interest in the subject. There are many models who wear
lingerie for magazine covers, but in reality they are indifferent to
it. A man with such a conjunction finds the woman he was once
with no longer the same. There could be fire between the Sun and
Mars in the beginning, but eventually Ketu will cast his eclipse
over all the planets.
233

Sun + Venus + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
the personality of the native is pleasant full of wisdom but they are
very disciplined and organized in their career and education. They
take their education seriously and make great government workers
and lawyers. Their sense of pleasure comes for fulfilling their duty
to home and country. They find great advantage in higher
education and becoming a beckon of such an art. If Venus has the
lowest degree they can be skilled in the art of teaching, preaching
and painting. They love studying philosophical books and spiritual
scriptures. If Saturn and Venus are less than 10 degree apart the
marriage can be delayed and such a person will find more pleasure
in work than in relationship. Saturn here is putting a cold nature
upon the value of love and romance while Jupiter is showing that
higher learning is true love. But, due to presence of Jupiter the
native does find hope in romance and love and could be married
between 25-28. The wife for the man could be in government or
finance while the husband could be a lawyer, professor or
administrative. If Jupiter and Saturn have close degree it can even
show bio mechanical career.
Sun + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
All masculine planets in one conjunction can show an explosion of
ego, maturity, duty and dignity. Besides having a sense of duty
towards the home, where such conjunction takes place, one also
strives towards structure, law and order. One may have a military
lifestyle unless such a conjunction occurs in the 12th House, where
it can actually make a person lazy. It is difficult to attain
knowledge due to Jupiter being in the midst of a planetary war
between Mars, Saturn, and the Sun. The native has to focus to
achieve higher knowledge. The Sun and Mars conjunction does
give the native the strength to fight and overcome all obstacles.
These are three great friends joined together against Saturn. In fire
signs, Jupiter receives help, but if Saturn gets debilitated without
234

being in kendra, it can hurt the sense of organization, structure and
order for the native. Their lives can be messy and untidy. Such a
conjunction in a favorable sign for Jupiter will prove to be
beneficial for all planets involved, especially the sign of
Sagittarius. Jupiter is the mediator, and has the knowledge and
skills to keep peace amongst everyone.
Sun + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:
This is a mixed conjunction, as it produces a person of virtue,
ethics and dignity, yet there is an undercurrent of manipulation.
They can take advantage of the system from time to time, and are
unafraid to do so. The father’s influence may be amplified in the
native's life. The father may be a best friend and a guru, yet have a
poor sense of values. Rahu will always try to sneak up on the guru
(Jupiter) to manipulate him. In today's age, it can mean that a
person is trying to give valuable information, or may find a way to
make a lot of money out of their teachings. In ancient times,
teaching students or anyone else was on donation basis. Rahu's
material desires want to make a profit out of everything. This is
why it can simply show a teacher or counselor making money for
advice and lessons. If Rahu has the highest degree in the
conjunction, then there would be more emphasis on teaching for a
huge profit rather than actually spreading any kind of knowledge.
Through such gains, the ego can be overblown. There is too much
pride here for one's value and knowledge. The father can also be
quite abusive if such a conjunction occurs in Aries, Libra, Scorpio,
and Capricorn, although other signs are not spared. In Aries, it can
produce an abusive father because the Sun is surrounded with heat
and the enemy. There is a unique personality to the father, and the
relationship the native has with him is unusual if Rahu has the
highest degree. The father may also be living in foreign lands.
235

Sun + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:
The personality of the native is quite eccentric. One minute they
are narcissistic, and the next they are highly spiritual. There is a
great debate within the person to find themself. The person will
reject their guru, yet at the same time have tremendous need to be
in the presence of one. They may have massive arguments with
their father, yet there are valuable lessons to be learned through
them. Ketu is rejecting all that is holy, while Mars and Jupiter are
trying to provide backing to the Sun's army. Ketu has a stronger
role, especially in the sign of Aries which can lead to great
distance from the father. In enemy or violent signs like Aries, it
can lead to bloodshed between father and son. There could be cuts,
bruises, or accidents with sharp objects involving the father. The
native keeps going back and forth about who they are. A better
determination can be made by seeing which two or three planets
are closest in degrees. All planets will not be at the exact same
degree due to their speed and duration. When it comes to four or
more planets in conjunction, knowing the closest degrees is
helpful.
Sun + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:
This could be a great conjunction for lawyer, judge, administrator,
diplomat, foreign policy administrator, and business owner. There
is a great sense of maturity and duty with the wits to succeed in the
business world. Rahu and Jupiter expand and amplify this quality,
while the Sun brightens it. The planet that is receiving such effect
is Saturn. We know Saturn is discipline, delay, organization,
structure, and frustration, and all of these qualities greatly impact
the native. There is a sense of optimism, but at the same time the
native feels scarred by life. Their father can be quite strict, unusual
in his way of implementing discipline, and may teach lessons that
the native may not always agree with. If Rahu has the highest
degree and Saturn has the lowest, there is tug of war and great
236

pressure to either be a diligent worker, or to take a leap forward by
breaking the rules. Depending upon the sign, either one of the
planets can win. The mahadasha of the planets in operation,
whether it's Saturn or Rahu, will change the situation for the native
and make it easier for them to decide their career path. Such
degree placement does not just impact the native's reputation, but
may also land them in jail.
Sun + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:
This conjunction impacts one's work and status. There is lack of
knowledge about oneself and their career path because the Sun and
Saturn are both karakas of 10th House. In acquiring knowledge,
there could be great dissatisfaction which can make someone very
confused. The native feels stressed if their career has nothing to do
with spirituality, religion, or the occult. They are unhappy with
whatever they do. Even if they become successful with God gifted
talent, they are still unsatisfied. This can happen when Ketu has
the highest degree and Saturn the lowest degree, or Saturn has the
second highest degree next to Ketu. The Saturn and Ketu
conjunction usually produces a person who knows they just have
to flip the switch on and work, but lack enthusiasm or interest in
what they are doing. There is tremendous turmoil in a conjunction
involving four planets. Usually Ketu's in a single conjunction, and
can work far better on its own rather than being impacted by so
many different energies. The father of the native may also be
dissatisfied with his career, and could be in a routine job for the
government, railroads, law, or be a teacher. It's always better to
have Ketu at least 7-10 degrees apart from rest of the planets, but
that is rarely the case. The native would constantly reject the
advice of the father and father figures, and want to run away from
authority.
237

Moon + Mercury + Venus + Mars conjunction:
The mind is filled with creativity, charm, need for communication
and great passion for networking. Mercury and Venus are very
social planets, and such combination makes the person reach out to
many people with great energy and drive. They show tremendous
artist talent and mimicking skills, but they can also be fired up
within minutes if pushed lightly. If the Moon has the lowest
degree, then the mind would be cool instead of having Mars' anger
control her. The Moon's emotions are energized with passion and
lust. This is a great conjunction for acting, art, writing, and
computer animation skills. There is a great communication with
the mother, who may even push the native into sports.
Moon + Mercury + Venus + Jupiter conjunction:
This conjunction is a blessing for most part. Jupiter, which is
considered the Gangajal (holy water) is interacting with natural
benefic planets and all of them are getting along well despite their
natural differences. The mind here is very calm, polite, and filled
with creative ideas about bettering the world or providing
knowledge to the world. This is especially true if Jupiter has the
lowest degree. The person would be inclined towards education
and mastering the art of spiritual knowledge. Such a conjunction in
the1st house is a blessing of God. This can even lead to great
acting talent as Jupiter expands the quality of all planets including
the artist Venus. The spouse for both sexes would be well
educated, cultured, and spiritual.
Moon + Mercury + Venus + Saturn conjunction:
The mind of the native is very sharp, organized, and structured.
They think of work constantly. There could be very creative, and
238

have the capacity to understand the amount of work required to
make an artistic project happen. The wife of the male native could
be mature with strong management and communication skills. The
marriage for the native can also be delayed; unless the conjunction
occurs in Aquarius or Venus having the lowest degrees. Both sexes
would have a mature spouse since Venus is the natural karaka of
marriage. Their involvement with their spouse or partner would be
overshadowed by their work and service.
Moon + Mercury + Venus + Rahu conjunction:
There is a great need for exploring the art and communication
fields while also profiting from them. Although there is a damper
on the mind due to Rahu's eclipse, the imagination and scientific
approach is being amplified. These people love exploring foreign
art, clothing, and languages. They have an unusual mind that
solves problems through alienating themselves from traditional
society. The mind can also be corrupt, and ways of doing business
might be shady. They may take advantage of a customer or client.
If this conjunction occurs in Virgo, and Mercury also has the
lowest degrees, then Rahu would be in control and well behaved.
The tendency to lie and cheat would be greatly subdued.
Moon + Mercury + Venus + Ketu conjunction:
The native feels they have mastered communication, relationships,
and art. If Ketu has the highest degree, this thought process leads
to dissatisfaction because these factors do not bring joy. Love and
relationships bring about happiness in the beginning, but
ultimately the person loses interest and wants to explore something
new and unique. Such people can practice tantra and occult. They
find pleasure in exploring the unknown and darker side of life. The
mind is sharp in terms of calculations and analyzing solutions.
They might be a genius in one subject but a complete joke in
others. Einstein had the aspect of Ketu in the 2nd house. He was a
239

brilliant mathematician, but failed in all other subjects and couldn't
even remember his own telephone number.
Moon + Mercury + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:
This conjunction gives the mind a speedy thought process with
respect to calculations and comprehension. This is an excellent
conjunction for a mathematician, problem solver, or number
cruncher. They are very much determined to achieve success in
higher education and religious pursuits. They are very strong
willed and aggressive in achieving their goals. Such people can
make great accountants, financial advisors, and motivational
speakers. When they communicate with people, they are full of
words of wisdom, and share their thoughts with authority. These
natives are very optimistic about their life and goals.
Moon + Mercury + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:
The mind is very active and interested in science, biology, and
higher education. Such people can easily attain their PhD and
Master’s degree. Although they question religion, they are still
very much interested in mythical stories of their past and foreign
cultures. They are obsessed with education and working with
different language skills. They make very good scientists in the
field of biology, mathematics, and physics. When they
communicate, they speak about worldly achievements and looking
at the world through the eyes of a scientist. They do not follow
religion or religious activities so quickly. They need to feel the
truth within them first before doing anything. Telling them about
God and rituals will not make them believe if Rahu has the highest
degree.
240

Moon + Mercury + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:
This conjunction can either show a genius who is a psychopath or
a genius who refuses to share his brilliance with the world. This
conjunction can be really good, average, or really bad for
intelligence depending on whether Jupiter or Mercury are playing
the part of functional malefic. These folks love to learn about
spirituality, occult, and religion. The native has a very distant
relationship with their mother. Although the mother might be
present, they may not communicate well unless Ketu has the
lowest degree or the Moon has the lowest degree. The mother
herself is quite communicative about religion and God, and
instilled a lot of religious values in the native.
Moon + Mercury + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:
The intelligence of this native will be quite organized and
disciplined most of the time. However, they also have tremendous
interest in making things perfect and structured. They do not leave
a project until it is perfected. When they communicate, they have a
focused, disciplined, and unusual style. Their mind may think
slowly, while their speech might be fast, causing a possible speech
disorder. They may start speaking quite late in life. They are very
good at business, and they know how to organize their marketing
plan and take it to a worldwide level. Rahu makes them interested
in different aspects of business and international relations. They
can be quite eccentric at times. If Rahu has the highest degree, they
can also make a very good liar. They will be so organized in their
ability to lie that no one can catch them. There is a lot of
communication with the mother. However, such communication
can turn bitter with foul language if Rahu has the most power. If
Saturn has the lowest degree while Rahu doesn't possess the
highest degree, then there is a well balanced approach to
communication. The mind and nervous system of the native is
filled with fear, anxiety, and panic attacks, especially if it occurs in
6th, 8th or 12th House.
241

Moon + Mercury + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:
The native feels separated from siblings and family members.
They have a lot of discipline, organization, and analytical skills,
but there is a sense of fear within them. They want to get away
when the problem cannot be solved amongst people. They feel a
lot of pressure from siblings regarding their mother. Depending on
which planets win the war here by degree, they will have the most
say regarding this person's psyche. They are interested in research,
and usually find themselves in isolated labs working on astronomy
and occult subjects. They are very intelligent in terms of
comprehending things, but they also have a darker side to them
where they may fantasize about the more gory things of life. Such
a person can also experience schizophrenia or delusions. If the
person has this in the 12th House with an aspect of 5th or 9th lord,
it can show enlightenment, and the ability to tap into the other
realm. They fantasize about death, and want to learn more about
exactly what the process is like. The mother can be verbally
abusive or may have abandoned the native at early stage of life if
Ketu and Saturn are hemming the Moon.
Moon + Venus + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:
The mind is very energetic, artistic, sensual and full of wisdom.
This is a great conjunction for a person who is pursuing career in
arts and media like acting, stage performance, singing and dancing.
Such career will be enhanced if Venus and Moon have the lowest
two degree because then they will be controlling the conjunction.
Jupiter and Mars here though give outbursts of anger if things are
not done the right way of if they do not get their demand filled.
Jupiter isn't all positive here because Jupiter is being molded by
malefic Mars. The spouse of the native which is represented by
Venus for men and Jupiter for women, will be very passionate,
sexual and might be a engineer, accountant or artist. The marriage
will be very good unless such conjunction happens in Hora of the
242

moon in 7th house. Then one must not argue with spouse of small
things.
Moon + Venus + Mars + Saturn conjunction:
The mind is quite disturbed here due to the war being created by
Mars and Saturn. The mind is in constant pressure from other
women and family members. Moon and Venus both are being
hemmed between two great malefic. This can not only delay
marriage, but can bring abuse from the spouse if married too early.
Such people can either have very high will power or no will power
at all depending upon who is willing the war. If Venus wins the
war by sign and degree that means Saturn would benefit from it
more and Mars would lose along with Moon. Since our will power
comes from the mind, it will not be accessed by Mars to gain his
strength. Such people can be very good in art, media, business or
as engineers and mechanics. They also make very good architects.
The native should marry late in life, around the age of 35. The
spouse could be in the media or engineering field.
Moon + Venus + Mars + Rahu conjunction:
These natives can run into quite a few turbulent relationships
before finding the right one. This may get involved with unusually
aggressive partners who may want nothing but sex and passion.
They are very creative with a passion for sports and keeping the
body fit. Sometimes, they can overwork their body because they
are obsessed with beauty and perfection. They are always looking
for relationships with powerful spouses. This is especially true for
a man. They want a woman who can take charge of matters and be
sexual at the same time. These natives run into the opposite sex
who have a foreign background. If Rahu has the highest degree yet
Venus has the lowest degree, then their encounter with the
opposite sex would be passionate and aggressive more than
243

physically abusive. Such conjunctions in the sign of Cancer can be
quite turbulent emotionally. These people do well in media, arts,
and fashion industries.
Moon + Venus + Mars + Ketu conjunction:
This is a heavy dose of different energies coming together where
relationships with aggressive spouses will only bring
dissatisfaction, yet they would still be attracted towards such
people. The mind is full of anger, and these natives can be ticked
off at very small things, especially in issues related to love,
marriage, and romance. The mother could be physically abusive
during childhood and may even abuse the native psychologically.
There will always be some dissatisfaction with the opposite sex,
especially in a wife for a man. This also gives a person bi-sexual or
homosexual thoughts. If Ketu and Venus have the closest degree in
a neutral or female sign, then it can show strong tendencies
towards same sex romance. If Ketu has the highest degree, then
there could be a lot of depression and fear in the mind from
women, brothers, or male friends. Such people can have so many
partners that they can turn towards prostitution if Venus is
debilitated in 8th House. They naturally make good fashion
designers, singers, and weapon experts. Even with such talent,
their interest can fade out in time and spirituality is what saves
them.
Moon + Venus + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
The mind is optimistic, artistic and at the same time disciplined,
organized and structured. When they have a creative idea they are
willing work hard to implement them. The ideas are organized and
put forth in action by gaining lot of knowledge regarding the idea.
Such people can make great businessmen, marketing genius,
attorneys, detectives and artists. Venus here is not only becoming
passionate about higher learning and higher educational pursuits
244

but also Venus becomes passionate about being a workaholic.
Such people get very mature spouses who might be older in age
and bring lot of wisdom and structure to the table. When Jupiter
and Saturn are with mind and pleasure, such people will only enjoy
peace of mind or any kind of pleasure once their work has been
done and accomplished. If they go on vacation while work is
unfinished, they will never enjoy their vacation as the mind will
constantly be involved in work and learning.
Moon + Venus + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:
This can be quite a normal conjunction that may not cause as many
psychological problems. Instead, it may bring a great need for
creative expression in singing, art, and acting. They love being in a
relationship with people who are well educated from foreign lands
or different cultures that can provide a creative outlet for them.
They feel the need to travel to exotic places with their partner, and,
most of the time they find their spouse in foreign lands. They have
a tremendous love for science and religion, but at the same time
they do not want to believe everything at first hand. They have the
urge to find the truth on their own rather than looking for a Guru,
which can be a mistake as Rahu sidetracks them from the things
that are good in this world. They come back to their roots of
finding the right guru after middle age when Rahu starts removing
its eclipse over the mind. Most of the time they may fall in love
with educated men or women, but things may not go as planned.
Their love interest can have unusual problems in the middle of a
relationship.
Moon + Venus + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:
This conjunction can show healing power with a great spiritual
mind. Such people find salvation in giving up worldly desire for
luxury, relationships and wealth. They may have differences with
their teachers and fatherly figures while growing up but towards
the middle they finally find themselves under a guidance of a guru.
245

The mind may not be full of turmoil because whenever Ketu is
with the lord of 5th and 9th house or Jupiter, it becomes spiritual
teacher than a blockage in life. This can show tremendous love and
interest in the occult science like Jyotish, numerology and Tarot.
Their spouses as well are very spiritual and educated but the native
still finds a distant relationship with them unless Venus wins the
conjunction war by sign and degree. The mother would be a great
guide for the native because she, too, possesses the natural
knowledge of universe and the spirit world. These people may
have a lot of wealth, but they love giving it away as they do not
find such things as a asset rather a burden.
Moon + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
The mind is mildly impulsive but mainly eager to learn and be
disciplined, organized and structured. They have lot of energy
when trying to thinking of ideas and wanting to learn different
subjects. Here, Mars may actually help the native because Jupiter
and Saturn are bringing some control over Mars. These people are
quite serious in their approach to life. They may have energy to
make a decision and stick to it, but they are also mature enough to
gather all the information about their decision, and back it up with
a strict work ethic and discipline. They are quite studious and
finish all their work before taking up a new task. If Saturn has the
lowest degree then it may also cause depression from time to time,
especially in the sign of Capricorn, where Jupiter might not be able
to help the Moon so much.
Moon + Mars + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction:
The mind races to different things but they are very bold and have
the ability to attack those who attack their livelihood and
personality. Such people may find a lot of interest in the
knowledge of other cultures and foreign things. They can also be
paranoid if Rahu is closest to the Moon or has the highest degree.
246

The mind races off to alien places within, through which they can
gather more knowledge. This is quite a mixed conjunction. At
times the native's mind is filled with anxiety and fear while at
other times the mind sees the light and hope at the end of the
tunnel regarding their aspirations and goals. Such a person can
make for a very dynamic and authoritative personality, and may
even want to write or alter the current religious text to brand
themselves as the new savior.
Moon + Mars + Jupiter + Ketu conjunction:
The mind is deeply impacted due to wanting to be separated from
the world while also trying to attain knowledge with lots of energy.
These people find peace in learning in ashrams and foreign places,
and have lot of interest in the occult and preach about the occult.
Impulsive decisions and stupid decisions can harm the native or
take them backwards in life. If Jupiter has the lowest degrees, then
again the Guru can guide the native on the right path without
making too many mistakes in life. But after the age of 28 when
Mars cools down, there would be great interest in the occult and
learning the spiritual texts. The native might get separated from
their mother at an early age if Ketu has the highest degree and
Mars has the lowest. But most of the time there is an isolated
relationship between the native and their mother.
Moon + Jupiter + Saturn + Rahu conjunction:
Many times the native has a difference of opinion from their
mother. The mother may also be a strict disciplinarian with
unusual or foreign behavior. There is a lot of interest in learning
and education. Such people can do well in school due to lots of
discipline and ability to organize their thoughts. However, if Rahu
has the highest degree and Saturn has the lowest degree, the mind
would be greatly troubled by the mother for fear of darkness. The
fear may be less pronounced due to the saving grace of Jupiter in
247

this conjunction. The native would fear ghosts and darkness or
have anxiety about alien things. Such people can do well in
scientific areas or educational areas.
Moon + Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu conjunction:
The Moon is being filled with optimism about the dark and
spiritual future. These natives constantly think bad things are going
to happen, especially if Ketu has the highest degree. They also feel
like they would be the saving grace for humanity and they have the
knowledge to guide everyone to a safe spot. They constantly battle
between isolation, separation, and spirituality. There is a tug of
war that sometimes tell them to be around spiritual and educated
people, even preachers, but at times they feel no one can provide
them the right guidance and knowledge. Such confusion needs to
be dealt with through meditation. Meditation will heal the mind
here and help them brighten up the qualities of Jupiter.
Mercury+ Venus + Mars + Jupiter conjunction:
The charm of the person has energy and wisdom to it. They have a
knack for being a straight shooter with a sensual wisdom to get the
attention of people, especially the opposite sex. If an artist, they
might just be good dancers, carpenters, and art teachers. However,
if they use too much force in whatever they do, this can also offend
people because they are all business. Mars and Jupiter are about
protecting and preaching. They protect and guard their talent while
also preaching to others to do the same. These folks are not only
passionate about art, but also passionate about education, science,
and higher religious learning. They will preach and defend their
ideas to the world and communicate the message of their gurus.
This can be a good and bad thing. A person growing up in a white
supremacist environment will mostly preach the wrong things
248

while someone born in a Buddhist family will preach the right
things.
Mercury + Venus + Mars + Saturn conjunction:
This conjunction puts focus and energy on one's thinking ability
and comprehension. They will have the discipline and energy to
implement their ideas while also taking a creative resource to find
solutions to their problems. They are again very head strong but at
the same time have the patience and structure to do everything
right. They are tremendously detail oriented, especially in the sign
of Virgo and Capricorn. Such people have fire within them
regarding career and usually their whole life is revolved around
career more than anything since Mercury, Saturn, and Mars are all
karakas of action and career. Venus may have a hard time dealing
with so much work and discipline. The pleasurable side of life
would hardly be enjoyable by the native if Venus is weak. A late
marriage should be given a serious thought because Mars and
Saturn are creating a war zone, and such a conjunction can lead to
dramatic results in relationships and marriage.
Mercury+ Venus + Mars + Rahu conjunction:
Venus again is feeling the wrath of darkness here. But, there seems
to be an overwhelming desire for pleasure, wealth, luxury, and
fame. Rahu doesn't hate Venus or Mercury and is neutral with
Mars. But, if Rahu attains the highest degree, then it can bring
about a lot of obsession with women, sex, lying, scamming, and
taking any kind of action to achieve one's goal. Mars is also getting
fire under itself by Rahu, as Rahu's nature to amplify the quality of
planets is there. The logical mind of the person is razor sharp and
quick. They are very good with computers, electronics, and
programming languages in software world. Venus also brings
creativity to the table, and there is a need to be creative in
249

whatever they do; whether it's computer programming,
engineering, or being an actor.
Mercury+ Venus + Mars + Ketu conjunction:
This conjunction may benefit Mercury, in terms of having the
ability to quickly calculate solutions, working with numbers, and
even being a professional in the medical field. However, the planet
that needs the most help is Venus. Being surrounded by malefic
twins (Mars and Ketu) there is a great dissatisfaction from male
partners, wife, husband, and marriage. Marriage can lead to
physical violence if it happens too early. If Venus has the lowest
degree, it would be able to handle the force of Mars and
detachment of Ketu, while influencing all the planets and bringing
harmony, love, and creativity on all aspects. Ketu will have a
creative way to search for spirituality, while Mars will have
creativity in his action, and Mercury will have creative intelligence
and creative communication. Ketu also represents mastery over
things related to the house where it's placed; because those were
the things you mastered in your past life. When Venus is attached
to Ketu, then creativity is not a problem for these people.
Mercury + Mars + Jupiter + Saturn conjunction:
